testSummary: Cold full pnpm test 41/41 packages green, no phase 2-13 regression. §18 acceptance gate 15 it() (one per §18 bullet, composing real ingest/processor/dispatcher/feedback/unsubscribe/onboarding/broadcast/automation-runner/metering cores + service-api + RLS backstop) + penetration-isolation 9 it() (RLS backstop non-BYPASSRLS read+write block, system-admin RLS exception, ingest/processor service-role scoping forged workspace_id rejected, scopedQuery guard, local-api token isolation, audited cross-read) -> pnpm test:acceptance 24/24. CDK assertions+synth-smoke 11/11. health 5/5, dlq-replay 4/4.
commandsRun: cd infra && npx tsc -b && npx cdk synth (EXIT 0, 118 resources, 0 IAM wildcards)
rm -rf .turbo && DATABASE_URL=... AWS_ENDPOINT_URL=... pnpm test (41/41 cold)
notes: Acceptance suite COMPOSES existing cores (no reimplementation). Fixed cdk.json app -> node dist/bin/infra.js (synth was broken). Full §14 CdpStack: WAFv2 REGIONAL WebACL + stage association; REST API + RequestValidator + Model + UsagePlan + ApiKey + UsagePlanKey + authorizer; 13 Lambdas EACH own least-privilege role (0 Action:'*'/Resource:'*' across all 13 IAM::Policy via findResources); 2 FIFO main queues + FIFO DLQ RedrivePolicy + EventSourceMappings; SNS topic+lambda subscription; SES ConfigurationSet; S3+CloudFront OAC; 4 EventBridge rules; 21 CloudWatch alarms (SES 3%/5% bounce + 0.1% complaint, per-workspace CDP/Reputation custom metric, per-DLQ depth>0, per-function Errors, per-queue oldest-message-age); Secrets Manager/SSM refs no inline secrets. infra tsconfig exactOptionalPropertyTypes:false (CDK typing friction; business packages stay strict). scripts/ added as @cdp/scripts workspace pkg. Pen-test exercises RLS backstop (SET LOCAL ROLE cdp_app_test + setSessionClaims) AND in-code service-role scoping. SES/SNS/S3/SQS/DNS mocked; Postgres never mocked in acceptance/pen tiers. No real AWS deploy.
